content.content:
335→// executeHumanStepBranch handles human intervention branches with Git-based manual intervention workflow
   336→func (o *fanoutOrchestrator) executeHumanStepBranch(ctx context.Context, branch BranchSpec, result BranchResult) BranchResult {
   337→	// Parse timeout from branch inputs
   338→	timeout := 30 * time.Minute // default timeout
   339→	if timeoutStr, ok := branch.Inputs["timeout"].(string); ok {
   340→		if parsedTimeout, err := time.ParseDuration(timeoutStr); err == nil {
   341→			timeout = parsedTimeout
   342→		}
   343→	}
   344→
   345→	// Create timeout context for this branch
   346→	branchCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, timeout)
   347→	defer cancel()
   348→
   349→	// Get build error context
   350→	buildError, _ := branch.Inputs["buildError"].(string)
   351→	if buildError == "" {
   352→		buildError = "Build failure - human intervention required"
   353→	}
   354→
   355→	// Check if runner is available for production mode
   356→	if o.runner == nil {
   357→		result.Status = "failed"
   358→		result.Notes = "human-step branches require production runner (not available in test mode)"
   359→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   360→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   361→		return result
   362→	}
   363→
   364→	gitProvider := o.runner.GetGitProvider()
   365→	buildChecker := o.runner.GetBuildChecker()
   366→	_ = o.runner.GetWorkspaceDir() // Available if needed for future enhancements
   367→
   368→	if gitProvider == nil || buildChecker == nil {
   369→		result.Status = "failed"
   370→		result.Notes = "human-step branches require GitProvider and BuildChecker"
   371→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   372→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   373→		return result
   374→	}
   375→
   376→	// Step 1: Create intervention branch name
   377→	interventionBranch := fmt.Sprintf("human-intervention-%s", branch.ID)
   378→
   379→	// Step 2: Create MR for human intervention
   380→	mrConfig := provider.MRConfig{
   381→		RepoURL:      "https://gitlab.com/placeholder/repo.git", // TODO: Get from runner context
   382→		SourceBranch: interventionBranch,
   383→		TargetBranch: "main",
   384→		Title:        fmt.Sprintf("Human Intervention Required: %s", branch.ID),
   385→		Description:  fmt.Sprintf("Build Error:\n```\n%s\n```\n\nPlease fix the build failure and commit your changes to this branch for automated validation.", buildError),
   386→		Labels:       []string{"ploy", "human-intervention"},
   387→	}
   388→
   389→	mrResult, err := gitProvider.CreateOrUpdateMR(branchCtx, mrConfig)
   390→	if err != nil {
   391→		result.Status = "failed"
   392→		result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Failed to create human intervention MR: %v", err)
   393→		result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   394→		result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   395→		return result
   396→	}
   397→
   398→	// Step 3: Poll for manual commits and validate build
   399→	pollInterval := 30 * time.Second
   400→	ticker := time.NewTicker(pollInterval)
   401→	defer ticker.Stop()
   402→
   403→	for {
   404→		select {
   405→		case <-branchCtx.Done():
   406→			// Timeout reached
   407→			result.Status = "timeout"
   408→			result.Notes = fmt.Sprintf("Human intervention timed out after %v", timeout)
   409→			result.FinishedAt = time.Now()
   410→			result.Duration = time.Since(result.StartedAt)
   411→			return result
   412→
   413→		case <-ticker.C:
   414→			// Check if human made changes by attempting build validation
   415→			buildConfig := common.DeployConfig{
   416→				App:           branch.ID,
   417→				Lane:          "A", // Simple build validation
   418→				Environment:   "dev",
   419→				ControllerURL: "", // Will be set by build checker if needed
